title: neonauclea zeylanica
intro: Neonauclea zeylanica, also known as the "Ceylon ironwood," is a plant species native to Sri Lanka. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Neonauclea zeylanica can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal benefits.
